summary: Iteration 47 - Admin Contest Management with 16 Questions Template COMPLETE. All 5 issues verified: (1) API dedup fix working, (2) Manual Live/Unlive toggle works (open→live→locked→open), (3) AutoPilot lifecycle code fixed (timedelta import), (4) Contest card shows 'Full Match Predictions (16 Qs)' template badge - clickable to expand all 16 questions with Hindi text, (5) All 16 questions merged into 1 full_match template with 1270 total pts. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' - This is a React hydration warning from the visual editor wrapper, not a functional issue

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed missing 'timedelta' import in autopilot.py - was causing runtime error in _manage_contest_lifecycle
AdminContestsTab.jsx: Well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Template dropdown shows 'Full Match Predictions (Full, 16 Qs, 1270 pts)' - correct format
Contest card shows template badge 'Full Match Predictions (16 Qs)' - clickable to expand questions
All 16 questions display with Hindi text and 4 options each
Option selection shows gold border highlight
Status toggle cycles: OPEN → Make LIVE → LOCK → Re-OPEN
Max 5 contests per match enforced in both frontend and backend
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded data (16 questions, 1 Full Match template, 70 matches)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 47 verified all 5 issues fixed. Key verified features: 1) Admin login flow works (Get Started → Phone → PIN → Admin Dashboard). 2) Matches bottom nav → Contests sub-tab shows match list with COMPLETED/LIVE/UPCOMING status badges. 3) Click match → Contest detail view with match header, progress bar (X/5), auto-lifecycle hint. 4) Contest card shows 'Full Match Predictions (16 Qs)' template badge - clickable to expand all 16 questions. 5) Questions display with Hindi text: Q1-Q4 are पहली पारी questions, Q5-Q16 are मैच questions. 6) Difficulty badges: EASY 55pts, MEDIUM 70pts, HARD 90pts. 7) Option selection shows gold border. 8) Status toggle: Make LIVE → LOCK → Re-OPEN. 9) Delete button with confirmation. 10) Max 5 contests enforced. 11) Backend PUT /api/admin/contests/{id}/status works for open/live/locked transitions. 12) Backend DELETE /api/admin/contests/{id} works. 13) Only 1 template exists (Full Match Predictions) with 16 questions and 1270 total pts.

fields: Template select (1 option: Full Match Predictions)

sample_questions: Q1: आज पहली पारी में कितने रन बनेंगे? (MEDIUM 70pts)
Q2: आज पहली पारी में कितने विकेट गिरेंगे? (EASY 55pts)
Q3: आज पहली पारी में कितने छक्के लगेंगे? (HARD 90pts)
Q5: आज का मैच कौन जीतेगा? (EASY 55pts)

bug_fix_applied.issue: Missing 'timedelta' import causing NameError in _manage_contest_lifecycle method
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added 'timedelta' to datetime import: 'from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta'
